title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - UI
scenario: PPIP dialog appears after onboarding when tapping "Continue as Guest" on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. On the final onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
expected: The PPIP (Product and Personal Improvement Program) dialog appears, asking the user to share basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to help improve performance and support. The dialog states no personal information is collected or shared with third parties, and preferences can be changed anytime in Settings. Two options are presented: "Don't Share" and "Share Data".
